get.description: Public health probe. No auth. Returns build identifiers so callers can confirm which deploy they're talking to.
Returns the active settlement chain id, RPC URL, USDC address, and LuxxonSettlement address. Use to drive client-side wallet flows without hardcoding addresses.
ONLINE supplier workspaces with a complete coverage triple. Returns center + radius only — no workspace ids or wallets. Drives the public coverage map.
Last 30 days of session requests, aggregated by ~5km cells. Returns cell centroid + request count + unmet count + avg max price. Anonymised — no wallets or workspace ids.
Identity self-introspection. Wallet sessions get the wallet + accessible workspaces (plus the picked one, if any); API-key callers get the bound workspace + scopes.

post.description: Step 1 of wallet sign-in. Returns a single-use nonce + the exact message to sign with the wallet's private key. The nonce expires in 5 minutes. Public — no auth required.

Step 2 of wallet sign-in. Verifies the signature (EOA via ECDSA recovery, smart wallets via ERC-1271), mints a wallet session cookie, and returns the workspaces this wallet can access. Public — the signature is the proof.
Step 3 — pin the wallet session cookie to a specific workspace + role. SpiceDB membership is re-checked here so a wallet just removed from a workspace can't pick it from a stale list.

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

post.description: Clears the lx_session cookie. Idempotent, always returns ok.
Step 1 of workspace creation. Returns a nonce + message; sign with the wallet that will own the workspace. Public — issuing a nonce leaks no state.
Step 2 — workspace creation. The signing wallet becomes OWNER + first member. Returns the new workspace plus the SpiceDB ZedToken (echo as X-Lx-Consistency-Token on subsequent reads).

CONFLICT.summary: CONFLICT — Conflicts with an existing resource

get.description: Workspaces the authenticated wallet can access, with role. Wallet-session only — API keys are workspace-scoped and don't list across workspaces.
Fetch a single workspace. Wallet sessions: SpiceDB membership re-checked. API keys: must match the key's bound workspace. 403 on either failure mode (existence is not leaked to non-members).

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

patch.description: Partial update. `name` is editable by any caller bound to the workspace; supplier fields (availability, coverage, deviceKind) require the SUPPLIER role.

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

INVALID_STATE.summary: INVALID_STATE — Operation not allowed in the current state

value.message: Operation not allowed in the current state

post.description: Producer's per-~2s location ping. Server records as append-only event; the liveness poller reads the latest per workspace to enforce geofence + freshness against any LIVE session. Sequence must be monotone; out-of-order returns 409.

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

CONFLICT.summary: CONFLICT — Conflicts with an existing resource

post.description: Issue a new API key for the workspace. `plaintext` is returned ONCE — persist client-side immediately; the server only stores sha256. Wallet-session only (API keys can't mint API keys).

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

get.description: All API keys in this workspace (including revoked). Plaintext is never returned here — only the prefix.

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

post.description: Stamp `revokedAt` so the key stops authenticating after the grace period. Idempotent. Wallet-session only.

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

get.description: Compute and persist a rate quote for (lat, lng, durationSeconds). The returned `quoteId` can be passed to POST /sessions to lock the rate; otherwise the quote expires and a fresh spot rate is used.

OUTSIDE_COVERAGE.summary: OUTSIDE_COVERAGE — Point is outside the coverage area

value.message: Point is outside the coverage area

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

post.description: Consumer asks for a live feed at (lat, lng). Optional pre-fetched quoteId locks the rate; otherwise a spot rate is computed and pinned on the row. Returns the new session in REQUESTED state plus the ZedToken to echo on follow-ups.

NO_CREDIT.summary: NO_CREDIT — No credit available — top up minutes

value.message: No credit available — top up minutes

INSUFFICIENT_CREDIT.summary: INSUFFICIENT_CREDIT — Insufficient credit for the requested duration

value.message: Insufficient credit for the requested duration

OUTSIDE_COVERAGE.summary: OUTSIDE_COVERAGE — Point is outside the coverage area

value.message: Point is outside the coverage area

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

get.description: All sessions for the caller's workspace, newest first.

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

post.description: Bulk-cancels every session where this workspace is the operator and the state is ASSIGNED. Useful when an operator's phone runs out of battery mid-stream or they need to release the workspace without waiting for the per-session expiry. Returns the list of cancelled session ids. No-op when no ASSIGNED sessions are owned by the caller.

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

NOT_OPERATOR.summary: NOT_OPERATOR — Caller is not an operator

post.summary: Cancel all ASSIGNED sessions for the operator workspace

get.description:
Fetch one session by id. Authorized via SpiceDB `view` permission — visible to both consumer and operator workspaces.

The response is enriched with caller-relative live fields:
- `authorization` when state=ASSIGNED and the caller is the consumer side — the EIP-712 payload to sign and POST to `/authorize`.
- `whepUrl` when state=LIVE — WebRTC playback URL for any administrator.
- `whipUrl` when state=LIVE and the caller is the operator side — WebRTC publishing URL.

Dual-role workspaces (same workspace on both sides of a session — the e2e pattern) see all applicable fields.

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

delete.description: Consumer-side cancel. Allowed only in REQUESTED — once an operator has accepted, the consumer must end (not cancel).

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

INVALID_STATE.summary: INVALID_STATE — Operation not allowed in the current state

value.message: Operation not allowed in the current state

post.description: Operator workspace claims a REQUESTED session, transitioning it to ASSIGNED and writing the SpiceDB operator_workspace relation.

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

NOT_OPERATOR.summary: NOT_OPERATOR — Caller is not an operator

INVALID_STATE.summary: INVALID_STATE — Operation not allowed in the current state

value.message: Operation not allowed in the current state

post.description: ASSIGNED → LIVE. Creates the IVS Stage, mints publisher (operator) + subscriber (consumer) tokens, stamps startedAt, flips the operator workspace to BUSY.

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

INVALID_STATE.summary: INVALID_STATE — Operation not allowed in the current state

value.message: Operation not allowed in the current state

post.description: REQUESTED → ASSIGNED via the dispatcher. Picks the longest-idle ONLINE SUPPLIER workspace, atomically flips it to BUSY, and returns the session row. With the deposit-pool model there is no per-session signature step — the session is ready for /start once ASSIGNED. 503 UNAVAILABLE if no SUPPLIER is ONLINE.

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

INVALID_STATE.summary: INVALID_STATE — Operation not allowed in the current state

value.message: Operation not allowed in the current state

get.description: Returns the WebRTC WHEP URL for a LIVE session. Stable for the lifetime of the underlying live_input, so this is just a read — call any time you need to (re)connect the player. Authorized for both consumer + operator workspaces.

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

INVALID_STATE.summary: INVALID_STATE — Operation not allowed in the current state

value.message: Operation not allowed in the current state

get.description: Returns the WebRTC WHIP URL for a LIVE session. Operator-only — only the assigned operator workspace can publish. Use to reconnect a producer browser tab or hand off the URL to a different device without calling /start again.

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

INVALID_STATE.summary: INVALID_STATE — Operation not allowed in the current state

value.message: Operation not allowed in the current state

get.description: Returns a JPEG of the most recent video frame from the operator's WHEP feed. Poll-friendly for AI agents consuming snapshots from a vision model. LIVE sessions only. Returns 404 FRAME_NOT_AVAILABLE until the first frame is decoded (~3-5s after /start).

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

FRAME_NOT_AVAILABLE.summary: FRAME_NOT_AVAILABLE — No video frame available yet

post.description: LIVE → ENDED. Finalizes the per-second meter and computes chargedMicroUsdc. Accepts either scope: typically the operator, but a consumer hang-up is also valid.

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

INVALID_STATE.summary: INVALID_STATE — Operation not allowed in the current state

value.message: Operation not allowed in the current state

get.description: Workspace wallet snapshot: tracked balance + allowance + last synced block. Balance authority lives on Base; this is a watcher-maintained cache.

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

get.description: Cursor-paginated ledger of every chain event we've seen for this workspace's wallet. Source of truth for reconstructing balances.

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

get.description: Returns the on-chain settlement payload + current status for a session. NOT_READY before ENDED, PENDING once composed, CONFIRMED once the relayer's tx is mined.

NOT_AUTHORIZED.summary: NOT_AUTHORIZED — Not authorized for this operation

INVALID_STATE.summary: INVALID_STATE — Operation not allowed in the current state

value.message: Operation not allowed in the current state

post.description: Receives live_input.connected/disconnected/errored events. Opens or closes LxDisconnectWindow rows. Authentication: URL path token + cf-webhook-auth header — both must match.

info.title: Luxxon API
info.description: Programmable vision — on-demand live video feeds

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: SIWE wallet sign-in. Used by the dashboard; API-key callers skip this.

tags.name: Me
tags.description: Identity self-introspection — wallet or API key.

tags.name: Workspaces
tags.description: Tenant root. Coverage area, availability, members.

tags.name: Pricing
tags.description: Live rate + optional pre-quoted rate lock.

tags.name: Sessions
tags.description: Visual session lifecycle: request → dispatch → authorize → start → end.

tags.name: Wallet
tags.description: On-chain wallet state and event log for a workspace.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Inbound video events from Cloudflare Stream. Internal.

data.description: Endpoint-specific payload. See the per-endpoint schema.

buildSha.description: GIT_SHA env at deploy time, or 'dev' when running unbuilt locally.

environment.description: Active environment. TEST runs on Base Sepolia; LIVE on Base mainnet. Only one is active at a time per deploy.

chainId.description: EVM chain id of the active settlement chain.

rpcUrl.description: Public RPC endpoint for the active chain.

usdcAddress.description: USDC ERC-20 contract on the active chain. 6 decimals — amounts are µUSDC integers.

settlementAddress.description: LuxxonSettlement contract address. Consumers approve USDC to this address before any session can settle.

detail.description: Short, safe-to-expose label scoping the failure site.

activeWorkspaceId.description: Currently-picked workspace, or null before the picker runs.

nonce.description: Random hex nonce. Single-use, expires in 5 minutes.

message.example:
Luxxon — sign in to prove wallet ownership.
Address: 0xAbC...
Nonce: 9f3a...
Expires: 2026-05-13T12:05:00.000Z
message.description: The exact bytes to sign — server-issued; do not modify.

walletAddress.description: EIP-55 checksummed wallet address requesting sign-in.
EIP-55 checksummed address recovered from the signature.

signature.description: 0x-prefixed signature. EOA or ERC-1271 smart wallet sig.

availabilityState.description: Supplier-side dispatcher signal. Settable to ONLINE/OFFLINE via PATCH; BUSY is set/cleared by the API on session start/end.

coverageLat.description: Center lat of the supplier's coverage circle. Decimal degrees. Required (along with lng + radius) before the workspace can go ONLINE.

coverageLng.description: Center lng of the supplier's coverage circle. Decimal degrees.

coverageRadiusMeters.description: Radius in meters. Dispatcher uses ST_DWithin on geography; meters are the native unit.

deviceKind.description: Self-declared producer hardware. Surfaced to consumers for filtering + trust framing.

consistencyToken.description: SpiceDB ZedToken; pass as X-Lx-Consistency-Token on follow-up calls.

slug.description: URL slug. lowercase alphanumeric + hyphen, 3–40 chars.

signature.description: Signature over the challenge message from POST /challenge.

availabilityState.description: Supplier-side dispatcher signal. Settable to ONLINE/OFFLINE via PATCH; BUSY is set/cleared by the API on session start/end.

coverageLat.description: Center lat of the supplier's coverage circle. Decimal degrees. Required (along with lng + radius) before the workspace can go ONLINE.

coverageLng.description: Center lng of the supplier's coverage circle. Decimal degrees.

coverageRadiusMeters.description: Radius in meters. Dispatcher uses ST_DWithin on geography; meters are the native unit.

deviceKind.description: Self-declared producer hardware. Surfaced to consumers for filtering + trust framing.

name.description: Human-readable workspace name. 1–80 chars; trimmed server-side.

availabilityState.description: Supplier flips between ONLINE (dispatcher will pick) and OFFLINE (invisible). BUSY is API-owned and not settable here.

prefix.description: First 20 chars of the plaintext key. Safe for UI display.

plaintext.description: Full plaintext key — show once, then drop client-side. Only sha256 is persisted.

prefix.description: First 20 chars of the plaintext key. Safe for UI display.

ratePerSecondMicroUsdc.description: µUSDC per second. String to preserve BigInt precision.

estimatedTotalMicroUsdc.description: µUSDC for the requested duration at the quoted rate.

corridorMultiplier.description: Geographic corridor multiplier (1.0 outside any corridor; >1 premium).

waitTimeoutSeconds.description: Pre-LIVE wait deadline in seconds. After `createdAt + waitTimeoutSeconds` without a first decoded frame, the session flips to EXPIRED.

ratePerSecondMicroUsdc.description: Rate per second in µUSDC. String — may exceed JS Number.

cleanSeconds.description: Chargeable seconds = (endedAt - startedAt) - sum(disconnect windows). Computed at /end and passed to settle().

videoBackendRef.description: Opaque video-backend reference (Cloudflare Stream live_input uid). Set at /start, null after /end teardown.

requestedLat.description: Latitude of the requested point. Sourced from the PostGIS `requested_at_point` geography column at read time. Null only for legacy rows pre-PostGIS migration.

requestedLng.description: Longitude of the requested point. Sourced from the PostGIS `requested_at_point` geography column at read time. Null only for legacy rows pre-PostGIS migration.

authorized.description: True once the consumer has POSTed their EIP-712 signature via /authorize. The raw signature stays server-side; this boolean lets clients gate UI affordances.

whepUrl.description: WebRTC WHEP playback URL. Present when state=LIVE; readable by both consumer + operator administrators.

whipUrl.description: WebRTC WHIP publishing URL. Present when state=LIVE and the caller is the operator side.

consistencyToken.description: SpiceDB ZedToken; pass as X-Lx-Consistency-Token on follow-up calls.

workspaceId.description: Optional — defaults to the caller's workspace; required for wallet sessions if it disagrees.

maxDurationSeconds.description: Upper bound on session duration in seconds.

waitTimeoutSeconds.description: Seconds the consumer is willing to wait for media to start. After `created_at + waitTimeoutSeconds` with no first decoded frame, the session transitions to EXPIRED without a meter or settlement. Independent of `maxDurationSeconds`. Must satisfy 5 ≤ n ≤ 3600. Defaults to 300 (5 minutes).

quoteId.description: Optional pre-fetched LxPriceQuote id to lock the rate.

waitTimeoutSeconds.description: Pre-LIVE wait deadline in seconds. After `createdAt + waitTimeoutSeconds` without a first decoded frame, the session flips to EXPIRED.

ratePerSecondMicroUsdc.description: Rate per second in µUSDC. String — may exceed JS Number.

cleanSeconds.description: Chargeable seconds = (endedAt - startedAt) - sum(disconnect windows). Computed at /end and passed to settle().

videoBackendRef.description: Opaque video-backend reference (Cloudflare Stream live_input uid). Set at /start, null after /end teardown.

requestedLat.description: Latitude of the requested point. Sourced from the PostGIS `requested_at_point` geography column at read time. Null only for legacy rows pre-PostGIS migration.

requestedLng.description: Longitude of the requested point. Sourced from the PostGIS `requested_at_point` geography column at read time. Null only for legacy rows pre-PostGIS migration.

authorized.description: True once the consumer has POSTed their EIP-712 signature via /authorize. The raw signature stays server-side; this boolean lets clients gate UI affordances.

whepUrl.description: WebRTC WHEP playback URL. Present when state=LIVE; readable by both consumer + operator administrators.

whipUrl.description: WebRTC WHIP publishing URL. Present when state=LIVE and the caller is the operator side.

cancelled.description: Cancelled session ids, in createdAt-ascending order (oldest first).

waitTimeoutSeconds.description: Pre-LIVE wait deadline in seconds. After `createdAt + waitTimeoutSeconds` without a first decoded frame, the session flips to EXPIRED.

ratePerSecondMicroUsdc.description: Rate per second in µUSDC. String — may exceed JS Number.

cleanSeconds.description: Chargeable seconds = (endedAt - startedAt) - sum(disconnect windows). Computed at /end and passed to settle().

videoBackendRef.description: Opaque video-backend reference (Cloudflare Stream live_input uid). Set at /start, null after /end teardown.

requestedLat.description: Latitude of the requested point. Sourced from the PostGIS `requested_at_point` geography column at read time. Null only for legacy rows pre-PostGIS migration.

requestedLng.description: Longitude of the requested point. Sourced from the PostGIS `requested_at_point` geography column at read time. Null only for legacy rows pre-PostGIS migration.

authorized.description: True once the consumer has POSTed their EIP-712 signature via /authorize. The raw signature stays server-side; this boolean lets clients gate UI affordances.

whepUrl.description: WebRTC WHEP playback URL. Present when state=LIVE; readable by both consumer + operator administrators.

whipUrl.description: WebRTC WHIP publishing URL. Present when state=LIVE and the caller is the operator side.

consistencyToken.description: SpiceDB ZedToken; pass as X-Lx-Consistency-Token on follow-up calls.

whipUrl.description: WHIP publish URL. The URL itself is the auth bearer.

whepUrl.description: WHEP playback URL. Anyone with this URL can subscribe until /end deletes the live_input — treat as a session-scoped secret.

relatedSession.description: Session id when the event is tied to a settlement; null for deposits/approvals.

sessionIdHash.description: Deterministic 32-byte hash of the session UUID — what gets passed to LuxxonSettlement.settle() as bytes32 sessionId.

toAmount.description: Operator share in µUSDC (post-fee). String for BigInt safety.

state.description: NOT_READY = session hasn't reached ENDED. PENDING = composed, not submitted. SUBMITTED = relayer broadcast. CONFIRMED = tx mined.
